hooks.command: cmd=$(printf '%s' "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_command" | tr '\n' ' '); printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git push.*(--force|-f).*(main|master)|git push.*(main|master).*(--force|-f)' && printf 'BLOCK: force-pushing to main/master is not allowed.\n' && exit 2; exit 0

cmd=$(printf '%s' "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_command" | tr '\n' ' '); printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -qE '\brm[[:space:]]+-[a-zA-Z]*rf|\brm[[:space:]]+-[a-zA-Z]*fr|DROP[[:space:]]+TABLE|TRUNCATE[[:space:]]+TABLE' && printf 'WARNING: Destructive command detected. Confirm with user before proceeding.\n' && exit 1; exit 0
